teacher_quality_gate.policy: skip_symbolic_comparison_when_teacher_quality_fails; null threshold means that metric is not required

visualizations.error: Insufficient finite Q1/Q2/Q3 evidence metrics for challenge-evidence visualization.

symbolic_time_errorbar.stat_note: point=geometric mean; whisker=95% CI on log-scale estimate
symbolic_time_errorbar.design_reason: Timing metrics are strictly positive and right-skewed, so geometric mean on a log axis is more stable for paper comparison.

speedup_boxplot.design_reason: Speedup is multiplicative by definition, so a log axis with 1x as the neutral reference preserves ratio semantics.

mse_shift_boxplot.design_reason: Most tasks cluster near zero while long-tail tasks can dominate, so a zero-centered robust scale is needed.

variant_overview.layout: one task per row; two columns = SymbolicTime / merged MSEs
variant_overview.stat_note: point=geometric mean; whisker=95% CI on log-scale estimate
variant_overview.design_reason: Symbolic time and MSE-family metrics are positive and skewed, so merged log-scale small multiples communicate variant gaps more cleanly.

field_guide.final_mse_loss_shift: icbr_mse - baseline_mse; negative means ICBR has lower MSE
field_guide.teacher_test_mse: Teacher numeric model MSE against real test labels before symbolic fitting.
field_guide.teacher_test_r2: Teacher numeric model R2 against real test labels before symbolic fitting.
field_guide.teacher_cache_hit: Whether teacher model was loaded from persistent cache.
field_guide.symbolic_target_mse_shift: icbr_target_mse - baseline_target_mse; negative means ICBR is closer to real targets.
field_guide.symbolic_target_r2_shift: icbr_target_r2 - baseline_target_r2; positive means ICBR has higher target R2.
field_guide.shared_tensor_candidate_time_ratio_no_sh: Q1 evidence: icbr_no_shared candidate time / icbr_full candidate time; >1 suggests shared tensor helps.
field_guide.shared_tensor_symbolic_time_ratio_no_sha: Q1 evidence: icbr_no_shared total symbolic time / icbr_full total symbolic time.
field_guide.contextual_replay_mse_gain_full_vs_no_re: Q2 evidence: icbr_no_replay mse - icbr_full mse; >0 suggests replay rerank improves imitation error.
field_guide.contextual_replay_rank_inversion_rate_fu: Q2 evidence: fraction of edges where replay-selected candidate differs from local top-1 in icbr_full.
field_guide.explicit_commit_mse_gain_explicit_vs_ref: Q3 evidence: icbr_refit_commit mse - icbr_full mse; >0 suggests explicit commit avoids refit drift.
field_guide.explicit_commit_refit_commit_param_drift: Q3 evidence: mean L2 drift between selected params and refit params under icbr_refit_commit.
field_guide.stats_schema: Each metric includes count | mean | median | std | min | max

significance_guide.sign_test_pvalue_two_sided: Two-sided sign test p-value on non-tie seeds.
significance_guide.mean_delta_ci95: Bootstrap 95% CI of mean delta across seeds.

variant_ablation_guide.icbr_full: ICBR with shared candidate evaluation + replay rerank + explicit commit.
variant_ablation_guide.icbr_no_shared: ICBR with per-edge serial candidate generation (shared batching disabled).
variant_ablation_guide.icbr_refit_commit: ICBR with refit commit path (explicit commit disabled).

point_ci95.best_for: Paper-style center-and-uncertainty comparison without bar-area distortion.
point_ci95.recommended_when: Need log-scale compatible estimates or task-level evidence summaries.

violin_box_points.best_for: Seed-level distribution comparison with density, median/IQR, and raw samples together.
violin_box_points.recommended_when: Need one chart to expose multimodality, spread, and small-sample dispersion.

variant_grid.best_for: Task-by-task variant comparison without mixing units on one axis.
variant_grid.recommended_when: Need each task on its own row, symbolic time on one panel, and merged MSE-family metrics on another.

combo_layout.best_for: Decision-ready report combining uncertainty views and distribution views under one visual language.
recommended_panels: Panel A: point + 95% CI (geometric mean for positive skewed metrics)
Panel C: task-row small multiples with merged MSE panel

teacher_quality_gate.pass_rule: teacher_test_mse <= threshold_mse AND teacher_test_r2 >= threshold_r2 when the corresponding threshold is set; null threshold disables that check
teacher_quality_gate.failure_policy: Skip baseline/ICBR symbolic comparison for that row and keep explicit gate reason.

teacher_cache.cache_key_rule: hash(task, seed, width, dataset_kind, dataset_path, dataset_variant, dataset_split_strategy, dataset_split_seed, teacher_grid, teacher_k, teacher_fit_opt, teacher_post_train_prune, teacher_prune_node_th, teacher_prune_edge_th, teacher_prune_iters, teacher_post_prune_steps, teacher_post_prune_lr, teacher_post_prune_lamb, teacher_post_prune_early_stop, teacher_post_prune_eval_every, teacher_post_prune_min_delta, teacher_post_prune_patience, train_num, test_num, train_steps, lr, lamb, profile, cache_version)

modes.readwrite: Read cache when available; train+write on miss.
modes.readonly: Read cache only; train without writing on miss.
modes.refresh: Ignore old cache and retrain, then overwrite cache.

teacher_training.feynman_reference_policy: For feynman_file tasks: train(opt=Adam by default; override via --feynman-fit-opt) -> repeat prune(node_th=1e-2, edge_th=1e-2) + refit(steps=100, lr=1e-3, lamb=1e-3, early_stop_check_every=5) for prune_iters rounds (default 1) -> cache.

extensibility: Add new tasks in the resolver layer (core task specs or feynman token expansion).
Rows-level details are preserved for error bars and downstream statistical tests.
Task stats CSV and significance CSV can be consumed by external plotting/report tools.
Teacher cache key version can be bumped with --teacher-cache-version for compatibility control.
